ValidationRule.description: Can't create/update Requests under threshold - DDQ under 50K OR Legal under 30K MIS-5847 - Updated logic MIS-5317 - Updated logic MIS-4963 - Created
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: OR( AND( ISBLANK(Quote__c), NOT(ISPICKVAL(Account__r.Stage__c, 'Paying Account')), LEN(Low_ARR_Deal_Reason_for_Exception__c) < 4, OR( AND( RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Supplier_Questionnaires', /* DDQ */ ISPICKVAL(Did_we_try_to_send_the_SW_template__c, 'Yes, the client pushed back'), Opportunity__r.ARR__c < 50000 ), AND( RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Legal_Services', /* Legal */ NOT(ISPICKVAL(Type_of_Paper__c, 'Customer Template')), Opportunity__r.ARR__c < 30000 ) ) ), AND( ISBLANK(Quote__c), ISPICKVAL(Account__r.Stage__c, 'Paying Account'), LEN(Low_ARR_Deal_Reason_for_Exception__c) < 4, OR( AND( RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Supplier_Questionnaires', /* DDQ */ ISPICKVAL(Did_we_try_to_send_the_SW_template__c, 'Yes, the client pushed back'), IF(Account_ARR__c >= Opportunity__r.ARR__c, Account_ARR__c, Opportunity__r.ARR__c) < 50000 ), AND( RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Legal_Services', /* Legal */ OR( AND( NOT(ISPICKVAL(Type_of_Paper__c, 'Customer Template')), IF(Account_ARR__c >= Opportunity__r.ARR__c, Account_ARR__c, Opportunity__r.ARR__c) < 30000 ), AND( ISPICKVAL(Type_of_Paper__c, 'Customer Template'), IF(Account_ARR__c >= Opportunity__r.ARR__c, Account_ARR__c, Opportunity__r.ARR__c) < 50000 ) ) ) ) ), AND( NOT(ISBLANK(Quote__c)), LEN(Low_ARR_Deal_Reason_for_Exception__c) < 4, RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Legal_Services', /* Legal */ OR( AND( NOT(ISPICKVAL(Type_of_Paper__c, 'Customer Template')), IF(Quote__r.Contract_Current_Annual_Amount__c >= Opportunity__r.ARR__c, Quote__r.Contract_Current_Annual_Amount__c, Opportunity__r.ARR__c) < 30000 ), AND( ISPICKVAL(Type_of_Paper__c, 'Customer Template'), IF(Quote__r.Contract_Current_Annual_Amount__c >= Opportunity__r.ARR__c, Quote__r.Contract_Current_Annual_Amount__c, Opportunity__r.ARR__c) < 50000 ) ) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: A request for legal services must meet the threshold of 30K for Legal / 50K for DDQ. If you think this should be an exception, please describe the reason in the field above and it will be reviewed by the business to approve.
